title: Penpie - Rekt
relevance_summary: Reentrancy attack exploiting batchHarvestMarketRewards() function to inflate staking balance and claim rewards

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls batchHarvestMarketRewards() and then immediately calls redeemRewards() in the same transaction.

red_flags: Unusual sequence of batchHarvestMarketRewards() followed by redeemRewards()
Multiple contract addresses involved in the exploit
monitoring_rules: Block any tx that calls batchHarvestMarketRewards() and then immediately calls redeemRewards() in the same transaction.
summary: Penpie suffered a $27 million loss due to a reentrancy attack exploiting the batchHarvestMarketRewards() function. A guard could have detected and blocked the attack by monitoring for transactions that call batchHarvestMarketRewards() followed by redeemRewards() in the same transaction.
